description: Analyze the 'Agreeableness' trait using the dataset '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv'. Create a computed variable 'A1r' to reverse-code item A1 (formula: 7 - A1) and a computed variable 'Agreeableness' to calculate the scale mean (formula: MEAN(A1r, A2, A3, A4, A5)). Conduct an Independent Samples T-Test comparing 'Agreeableness' between genders using 'gender' as the grouping variable and including group descriptives. Save the project to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25_Agreeableness.omv'. Record the mean for males (gender=1), mean for females (gender=2), the t-statistic, and the p-value (all rounded to 3 decimals) in a text file at '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/agreeableness_results.txt'.
